description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:lts-alpine Docker image with a global before_script that runs `yarn install`. Define two stages: test and build, and cache the `node_modules/` directory keyed by `${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}`. In the test stage add a `lint` job that runs `yarn lint`. In the build stage add a `build-commit` job that runs `yarn run build`, produces an artifact named `$CI_PROJECT_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA` containing the `dist/` directory, and is excluded from tag pipelines. Also add a `build-tag` job that runs `yarn run build`, produces an artifact named `$CI_PROJECT_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_TAG` with the same `dist/` directory, and runs only for tag pipelines.
